process.name: SQL Server Express 2022 (SQLPASS)
process.description: Installa SQL Server Express 2022 con istanza SQLPASS (Mixed Mode). Rileva automaticamente il nome dell'exe scaricato.

process.name: Download media
Extract media
process.scriptContent:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$temp = $env:KLEVADEPLOY_TEMP_DIR
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($temp)) { throw 'KLEVADEPLOY_TEMP_DIR mancante' }
$media = Join-Path $temp 'KlevaDeploy\sql2022_media'
$extract = Join-Path $temp 'KlevaDeploy\sql2022_extract'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $media, $extract | Out-Null
$exe = Get-ChildItem -Path $media -File -Filter '*.exe' | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
if (-not $exe) { throw ('Nessun .exe trovato in: ' + $media) }
& $exe.FullName /Q /X:"$extract"
if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
exit 0

process.name: Install SQLPASS
process.scriptContent:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$saPwd = $env:KLEVADEPLOY_SQLPASS_SA_PASSWORD
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($saPwd)) { throw 'Imposta KLEVADEPLOY_SQLPASS_SA_PASSWORD' }
$temp = $env:KLEVADEPLOY_TEMP_DIR
if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($temp)) { throw 'KLEVADEPLOY_TEMP_DIR mancante' }
$extract = Join-Path $temp 'KlevaDeploy\sql2022_extract'
$setup = Join-Path $extract 'setup.exe'
if (!(Test-Path $setup)) { throw ('setup.exe non trovato in: ' + $extract) }
$args = @(
  '/Q', '/ACTION=Install',
  '/IACCEPTSQLSERVERLICENSETERMS=True',
  '/FEATURES=SQLENGINE',
  '/INSTANCENAME=SQLPASS',
  '/SECURITYMODE=SQL',
  ('/SAPWD="' + $saPwd + '"'),
  '/SQLSYSADMINACCOUNTS=BUILTIN\Administrators',
  '/TCPENABLED=1', '/NPENABLED=0',
  '/BROWSERSVCSTARTUPTYPE=Automatic',
  '/UPDATEENABLED=0'
)
$p = Start-Process -FilePath $setup -ArgumentList $args -Wait -PassThru
exit $p.ExitCode
